_meta.description: Held-out evaluation set for governed self-enhancement (Experiment 4).
_meta.purpose: These NL challenges are NOT in the training triples and NOT covered by existing planner rules. They define 'more capable' as a fitness function: the loop's score is how many of these it can handle correctly end-to-end.
_meta.warning: The developer role must NEVER modify this file. The verifier reads it from outside the sandbox. Tampering = immediate cycle rejection + halt.
_meta.schema: Each challenge has: setup (precondition program), intent (what user types), verify (program to check result), expected_output (what verify should output)

challenges.setup: create file alpha.txt with content "hello world"
create file alpha.txt with content "data here"

create file alpha.txt with content "a"
append "b" to alpha.txt
append "c" to alpha.txt
create file alpha.txt with content "one two three"

challenges.intent: create a new file alpha.txt with content "hello"
make a file called alpha.txt with content "test"
count how many lines are in alpha.txt
challenges.setup:
create file alpha.txt with content "x"
append "y" to alpha.txt

challenges.intent: tell me the word count of alpha.txt
challenges.setup: create file alpha.txt with content "a b c d"

challenges.intent: what is the line count of alpha.txt
challenges.setup:
create file alpha.txt with content "1"
append "2" to alpha.txt
append "3" to alpha.txt
append "4" to alpha.txt

challenges.intent: get the first 3 lines of alpha.txt
challenges.setup:
create file alpha.txt with content "a"
append "b" to alpha.txt
append "c" to alpha.txt
append "d" to alpha.txt
challenges.description: Verbose head with 'get the first N lines of'

challenges.setup:
create file alpha.txt with content "x"
append "y" to alpha.txt
append "z" to alpha.txt
append "w" to alpha.txt

challenges.intent: concatenate alpha.txt and beta.txt into gamma.txt
challenges.setup:
create file alpha.txt with content "aaa"
create file beta.txt with content "bbb"

create file alpha.txt with content "data"
append "more" to alpha.txt
challenges.description: Clear file contents. Empty file has 0 lines.

challenges.intent: what is the word count for alpha.txt
challenges.setup: create file alpha.txt with content "hello world foo"
